title: AARP CAREGIVING COMMUNITY RESOURCES - 211info
text: AARP OREGON AARP CAREGIVING COMMUNITY RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information connecting caregivers with direct services and support and offers a variety of resources, including care guides, how-to videos, tip sheets, and webinars. Also offers a community resource finder for family caregivers, people living with Alzheimer's and other dementias, and those involved in care-related decisions, including veterans, service members, and their families. AARP provides a web-based or printed caregiver guide with information, materials, and resources for those caring for a loved one. 1455 SW Broadway Suite 1490 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Paid or unpaid caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-5pm Email (888) 885-0013 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (888) 885-0013 Aarp Contact Center Español (877) 366-0049 Aarp Contact Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call to request the printed caregiver guide FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Internet Information Resources Internet Information Resources * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Kinship Navigator Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Alzheimer's Disease Specialized Information and Referral * Caregivers Talklines/Warmlines * Caregiver Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AARP COUNSELING SETTINGS - AARP HELPLINE LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - FRAUD WATCH NETWORK MUTUAL SUPPORT - CONNECTING PUBLIC SAFETY - AARP DRIVER SAFETY PROGRAM TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - TAX AIDE SITES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AARP OREGON
